CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(PersonOtherPhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & PersonOtherPhone, IF(LEFT(PersonOtherPhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(PersonOtherPhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(PersonOtherPhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(PersonOtherPhone, 10, 4), PersonOtherPhone)), PersonOtherPhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(PersonOtherPhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Outro Telefone Pessoal (exibição)
